zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby於1273年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾維洛賀比時，他的父親Sir William de Willoughby33歲，母親Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby32歲。他於1303年與Baroness Margaret Deincourt在英國林可爾史爾維洛賀比結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1317年3月25日在英國林可爾史爾維洛賀比享年44歲，埋葬在巴基斯坦آزاد جموں و کشمیر布利a爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Willoughby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Willoughby, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Nottinghamshire, and Warwickshire. They are named from an Old English +wilig ‘willow’ + Old Norse bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

variants.name: Wilby
meanings: habitational name from any of the places called Wilby, in Suffolk, Norfolk, and Northamptonshire. The first placename is probably named from an Old English wilig ‘willow’ + Old English bēag ‘circle, ring’; the Norfolk placename derives from Old English wilig + bēag or Old Norse bý ‘farmstead, village’; the Northamptonshire placename derives from the Old Norse personal name Vili + bý.
Redmonds has demonstrated that in the parish of Hipperholme, and subsequently elsewhere in Yorkshire, Wilby occurs as a variant of Willoughby .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby was born in 1273, in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir William de Willoughby, was 33 and his mother, Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby, was 32. He married Baroness Margaret Deincourt in 1303, in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 25 March 1317, in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 44, and was buried in Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby est né en 1273, à Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William de Willoughby, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Baroness Margaret Deincourt en 1303, à Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 25 mars 1317, à Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby 1273 in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir William de Willoughby 33 und seine Mutter Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby 32. Er hat 1303 in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England Baroness Margaret Deincourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 25. März 1317 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby è nato il nel 1273 nel Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir William de Willoughby, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Baroness Margaret Deincourt nel 1303, nel Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 25 marzo 1317, nel Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby(이)가 1273년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 윌루그h비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir William de Willoughby(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1303년 영국 링코실르 윌루그h비에서 Baroness Margaret Deincourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1317년 3월 25일 영국 링코실르 윌루그h비에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 파키스탄 آزاد جموں و کشمیر 버이a에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby nasceu em 1273, em Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William de Willoughby, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Baroness Margaret Deincourt em 1303, em Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 25 de março de 1317, em Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Paquistão.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby родился в 1273 г. в местности уиллоугби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir William de Willoughby было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Baroness Margaret Deincourt в 1303 г. в местности уиллоугби, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 25 марта 1317 г. в местности уиллоугби, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности буриaл, آزاد جموں و کشمیر, Пакистан.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Robert de Willoughby I Baron Willoughby d'Eresby nació en 1273, en Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William de Willoughby, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Alice de Beke heiress of Eresby, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Baroness Margaret Deincourt en 1303, en Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 25 de marzo de 1317, en Willoughby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistán.
